Selecting

Lefts
I none
C C-0n length 1
AND 45-0 length 1
OR 70-0n length 1

OR-NOT none

Rights
I 6-7 5-6 4-5 3-4 2-3 1-2 0-1 length 7
C none
AND 67-7 length 1
OR none
XOR none
AND-NOT none
OR-NOT none

Left longest: 2
Right longest: 7

Left winner: I none, C lost, AND lost, OR lost, XOR none, AND-NOT win, OR-NOT none
Right winner: I win, C none, AND lost, OR none, XOR none, AND-NOT none, OR-NOT none

Longest Left: AND-NOT 67-0 70-1n
Longest Right: I 6-7 5-6 4-5 3-4 2-3 1-2 0-1

7 + 2 = 9 > 8
Left will be truncated to length 8 - 7 = 1

Truncated left: AND-NOT 67-0 truncated
Truncated right: I 6-7 5-6 4-5 3-4 2-3 1-2 0-1

Tentative from right

6 I 5
5 I 4
4 I 3
3 I 2
2 I 1
1 I 0

Tentative
0 AND-NOT 67
1 I 0
2 I 1
3 I 2
4 I 3
5 I 4
6 I 5
7 I 6

Preferred from right
7 I 6
6 I 5
5 I 4
4 I 3
3 I 2
2 I 1
1 I 0
0 AND-NOT 67

Preferred from left
0 AND-NOT 67
1 I 0
2 I 1
3 I 2
4 I 3
5 I 4
6 I 5
7 I 6

Matched
0 AND-NOT 67
1 I 0
2 I 1
3 I 2
4 I 3
5 I 4
6 I 5
7 I 6

Applying to 11101111
Input
I 0 = 1
I 1 = 1
I 2 = 1
I 3 = 0
I 4 = 1
I 5 = 1
I 6 = 1
I 7 = 1
Output
0 AND-NOT 67 = AND(I 6,I 7n) = AND(I 6,NOT(I 7)) = AND(1,NOT(1)) = AND(1,0) = 0
1 I 0 = 1
2 I 1 = 1
3 I 2 = 1
4 I 3 = 0
5 I 4 = 1
6 I 5 = 1
7 I 6 = 1

\boxed{01110111}
